attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 $$BatchId BATCH_ID,
 CCRH.RETURN_ID,
 CCRH.AAR_NUMBER,
 CCRH.RETURN_STATUS,
 CCRH.ACTIVE,
 CCRH.RETURN_REASON,
 CCRH.RETURN_FROM_COUNTRY_CD,
 CCRH.RETURN_TYPE,
 CCRH.ORIG_DEAL_ID,
 CCRH.ORIG_WEB_ORDER_ID,
 CCRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER,
 CCRH.ORIG_ERP_HEADER_ID,
 CCRH.ORIG_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
 CAST(CCRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_BOOKED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)),
 CCRH.ORG_ID,
 CCRH.INVOICE_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 CCRH.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 CCRH.PRICE_LIST_ID,
 CCRH.CURRENCY_CODE,
 CCRH.APPLICATION_FLOW,
 CCRH.RESTOCKING_FEE_PERCENTAGE,
 CCRH.ADDITIONAL_RETURN_NOTES,
 CCRH.ORDER_TOTAL,
 CAST(CCRH.SUBMITTED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)),
 CCRH.SUBMITTED_BY,
 CCRH.SUBMITTED_BY_PROXY,
 CAST(CCRH.CREATED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)),
 CCRH.CREATED_BY_PROXY,
 CCRH.CREATED_BY,
 CAST(CCRH.UPDATED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)),
 CCRH.UPDATED_BY,
 CCRH.CSOPS_CASE_NUMBER,
 CCRH.CSOPS_NOTES,
 CCRH.CSOPS_CUSTOMER_NOTES,
 CCRH.SHARE_NODE_ID,
 CCRH.APPLICATION_SUB_FLOW,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
 CAST(CCRH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS VARCHAR(19)),
 CAST(CCRH.REFRESH_DATETIME AS VARCHAR(19)),
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
 CCRH.EXPEDITE_FLAG,
HOLD_FLAG AS HOLD_FLAG
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER   CCRH
WHERE  SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE'
AND RETURN_STATUS <>1
QUALIFY RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY CCRH.RETURN_ID ORDER BY CCRH.RETURN_ID, CCRH.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
